text: i can't give you a dosing amount — that needs to come from her pediatrician or pharmacist, since it depends on her exact weight and their guidance. what does concern me a bit is the combination of a fever this high lasting two days plus unusual sleepiness — that's worth a call to her doctor's office today (or an urgent/after-hours line if it's outside office hours) rather than just treating it at home. while you're getting that sorted, keeping her hydrated with small sips of fluid is the main thing you can do. do you have her pediatrician's number handy, or want help thinking through what to tell them when you call?
